testcase.name: expireOverdueBookings_dbQueryFails_doesNotPropagateException
testcase.system-out: 20:39:25.319 [main] ERROR com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingExpiryScheduler -- Failed to query expired bookings: DB unavailable — connection pool exhausted java.lang.RuntimeException: DB unavailable — connection pool exhausted at com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingExpiryScheduler.expireOverdueBookings(BookingExpiryScheduler.java:48) at testcase.name: expireOverdueBookings_twoExpiredBookings_expiresBoth
testcase.system-out: 20:39:25.382 [main] INFO com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingExpiryScheduler -- Found 2 expired booking(s) to process 20:39:25.383 [main] INFO com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingExpiryScheduler -- Expired booking 1 for user 1 (concert 10) 20:39:25.383 [main] INFO com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingExpiryScheduler -- Expired booking 2 for user 1 (concert 10) 20:39:25.383 [main] INFO com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingExpiryScheduler -- BookingExpiryScheduler done: 2 expired, 0 failed

testcase.name: expireOverdueBookings_oneBookingFails_continuesProcessingRemainder
testcase.system-out: 20:39:25.389 [main] INFO com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingExpiryScheduler -- Found 3 expired booking(s) to process 20:39:25.389 [main] INFO com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingExpiryScheduler -- Expired booking 1 for user 1 (concert 10) 20:39:25.389 [main] ERROR com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingExpiryScheduler -- Failed to expire booking 2: Transient DB error during b2 expiry java.lang.RuntimeException: Transient DB error during b2 expiry at com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingService.expireBooking(BookingService.java:456) at com.geekup.concertbooking.module.booking.BookingExpiryScheduler.expireOverdueBookings(BookingExpiryScheduler.java:67) at
